provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Agricultural Resources Conservation (Utilisation of Veld Products) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition:
the complete record keeping by the registered dealers and exporters of all transactions including buying, selling, making of donation, receiving of donation,
"Dealer" means a person permitted under these Regulations to carry on a business of dealing in veld products
gathering of veld products, including picking, cutting, burning, uprooting, transplanting, digging up and collecting
a non-domesticated, vegetative biological resources that may be used for construction, medical, food, cultural activities and firewood.
